THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

REMARK:REMARK:RECEIVED RETURNED MAIL FORM THE POST OFFICE ON 10/28/25. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM BY CERTIFIED MAIL, MAILED TO SOUNDS BAZAAR LLC. RETURN TO SENDER, UNCLAIMED, UNABLE TO FORWARD, RETURN TO SENDER.
